Description: Establish the foundational NestJS and Angular repositories and base database schemas.
Generate NestJS project setup TypeORM connect to MySQL database and configure environment variables (.env).
Generate Angular project install Angular Material configure proxy.conf.json for API requests.
Create TypeORM Entities for User Stock Order Portfolio Transaction WalletTransaction Watchlist StockPriceHistory.
Implement secure JWT authentication OTP and 2FA.
As a user I want to register and verify my email using an OTP code sent via email.
As a user I want to log in securely and receive an access token.
As a user I want to setup two-factor authentication for added security.
As a user I want to request a password reset via email OTP.
Manage user balance deposits via VNPay and secure withdrawals.
As a user I want to deposit money into my trading account securely using VNPay sandbox.
As a user I want to withdraw my funds and verify the transaction with an OTP.
As a user I want to view my deposit and withdrawal history.
Allow users to view market data and track stocks.
As a user I want to view a paginated listed of all available stocks with their current prices and change percentage.
As a user I want to view candlestick charts for a specific stock to analyze its history.
As a user I want to add or remove stocks from my personal watchlist.
System to place validate and manage trading orders.
As a user I want to place BUY/SELL MARKET orders to matched immediately.
As a user I want to place BUY/SELL LIMIT orders to match at my desired price.
As a user I want to cancel or adjust price/quantity of my pending limit orders.
As a user I want to see my order history and their statuses (Pending Partial Filled).
Core engine matching bids/asks and settling balances/portfolios.
Implement the core matching algorithm prioritizing best prices and earliest times.
Logic to deduct balances add to portfolios and create Transaction history after a match.
Create a cron job / interval to repeatedly run the matching engine for all stocks.
Aggregate pending BUY and SELL orders into price levels (Bids/Asks) for the Orderbook.
Tracking user investments and PnL.
As a user I want to view my owned stocks average buy prices and total locked quantity.
As a user I want to see my real-time profit and loss for each stock in my portfolio.
As a user I want to view my complete list of filled trades.
Live data pushing without polling.
Initialize Socket.io or native WebSockets in NestJS.
Push live price ticks to all subscribed frontend clients after a match.
Push live updates to the Bids/Asks order book view.
Send a private notification to a user when their order is filled.
Automated bots to keep the simulated market moving.
Create mock user accounts with high balances serving as liquidity providers.
Script to randomly place plausible buy/sell orders around the current market price.
Tools for administrators to manage the system.
As an admin I want to view total users total trading volume and fees collected.
As an admin I want to view lock or unlock user accounts.
As an admin I want to halt trading for specific stocks or forcefully cancel orders.
Stop Loss Take Profit Trailing Orders.
As a user I want to set a predefined exit price to limit my losses or secure profits.
As a user I want to set a trailing price that follows the market up to optimize profits.
